title: Jake Green
content:
{{Actor |image = Jake Green.jpg |DOB = March 31, 1984 |tv series = ''[[Agents of S.H.I.E.L.D.]]''
*''[[Uprising (episode)|Uprising]]''
''[[Your Friendly Neighborhood Spider-Man]]''
*''[[The Parker Luck]]'' |character = Terrified Driver
[[Butane]]}} '''Jake Green''' portrayed Terrified Driver in the ''[[Agents of S.H.I.E.L.D.]]'' episode ''[[Uprising (episode)|Uprising]]''. He also voiced [[Butane]] in the ''[[Your Friendly Neighborhood Spider-Man]]'' episode ''[[The Parker Luck]]''. ==Trivia== *Jake Green voiced [[Eddie Brock]] in the video game ''{{WPS|Marvel's Midnight Suns}}''. *Jake Green voiced {{WPS|Michael Morbius}} in the video games ''{{WPS|Marvel's Midnight Suns}}'' and ''{{WPS|Marvel Ultimate Alliance 3: The Black Order}}''. *Jake Green provided additional voices in the video games ''{{WPS|Spider-Man (2018 video game)|Spider-Man}}'' and ''{{WPS|Spider-Man: Miles Morales|Spider-Man: Miles Morales}}''. *Jake Green has portrayed characters for both {{WPS|Marvel}} and {{WPS|DC Comics#DC Entertainment|DC Entertainment}}. He voiced Dr. Ivo in ''{{WPS|My Adventures with Superman}}'' and CO Boles in the video game ''{{WPS|Batman: Arkham Shadow}}''. *Jake Green previously worked with [[Jeff Trammell]] and [[Stu Livingston]] in ''{{WPS|The Owl House}}''. *Jake Green previously worked with [[Kyle MacLachlan]] in ''{{WPS|Star Wars: Young Jedi Adventures}}''. *Jake Green shares his birthday with [[Brian Tyree Henry]]. ==External Links== *{{IMDb|2482007}} *{{Twitter|iamjakegreen}} *{{Instagram|iamjakegreen}} *{{Vimeo|iamjakegreen}} [[Category:Actors]] [[Category:Voice Actors]] [[Category:Agents of S.H.I.E.L.D. Actors]] [[Category:Your Friendly Neighborhood Spider-Man Actors]] [[Category:Actors with Roles in Comic Book Adaptations outside the Marvel Cinematic Universe]] [[Category:Actors with Multiple MCU Roles]]
